crossBorderTransfers.purpose: Document AI extraction within Mistral's EU region family from EEA-hosted runners.
Structured test-case generation inside the operator's EEA Azure region; intra-EEA flow recorded for replay verifiability.
Visual sidecar inference inside the operator's EEA Azure region; intra-EEA flow recorded for replay verifiability.
Jira REST or paste-only fallback from operator-controlled Atlassian tenant or air-gapped paste source into the EEA-hosted runner.

subprocessors.purpose: OCR + structured extraction over operator-supplied PDF / image attachments referenced in custom-context sources.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: Stateless from the package's perspective. Operator must configure the deployment with retention floor of 0 days for prompt/response bodies.

subprocessors.legalName: Operator-selected Atlassian Cloud tenant (*.atlassian.net) or self-hosted Jira Data Center
subprocessors.purpose: Issue read access (Jira REST API v3) for multi-source test-intent ingestion. Paste-only fallback (jira_paste) is available when the REST path is unavailable or air-gapped.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: Package persists only redacted Jira IR; raw API responses are not written. Operator-controlled retention on the upstream tenant.

subprocessors.legalName: Operator-selected LLM gateway (Azure OpenAI / Azure ML inference / equivalent)
subprocessors.purpose: Structured test-case generation against a hand-rolled JSON-Schema; consumes Business Test Intent IR + Visual Sidecar IR and emits GeneratedTestCase[]. Never receives image payloads.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: Package retention is zero — no prompt, completion, or response body persisted outside the per-run evidence directory; persisted artifacts are PII-redacted IR.

subprocessors.legalName: Operator-deployed object-storage backend (S3 / Azure Blob / GCS through operator filesystem layer)
subprocessors.purpose: Operator-mounted backing store for the run-directory output. The package never calls any object-storage API directly.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: Operator-controlled. Atomic-rename on artifact write ensures a partial write is never observed.

subprocessors.purpose: Operator-configured outbound webhooks (incident-management, reviewer notifications, audit-log shipping). The package ships with no default allow-listed hosts.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: Hook bodies use bodyTemplate with environment-variable placeholders; no raw screenshots, raw Jira responses, or raw paste bytes leave the host.

subprocessors.legalName: Operator-selected multimodal vision deployment (e.g. llama-4-maverick-vision primary, phi-4-multimodal-poc fallback)
subprocessors.purpose: Computes the Visual Sidecar IR from per-screen captures. Never sees raw test-intent text; the role-separation invariant keeps the structured-test-case generator deployment image-free.
subprocessors.retentionPolicy: The package never persists raw screenshot bytes (rawScreenshotsIncluded: false). Captures live in the gateway only for the duration of the inference call.
